name: Pre-College Summer Residential Program - Stevens Institute of Technology
overnight_evidence_snippet: Join Stevens' pre-college summer residential program for high school students and explore STEM fields through hands-on courses and research.

name: Summer Residential Program - Tulane University
overnight_evidence_snippet: The LCCA Summer Residential Program is specifically for Louisiana high school students . Students from outside of the state are encouraged to explore Tulane Pre-College Programs The cost for the two-week program is $5,495; however, all admitted students are provided with scholarships covering most of the cost Yes.
